positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a celestial forest, featuring large, interconnected bioluminescent flora roots and glowing, crystalline geometric patterns that mimic constellations. The central composition should emphasize negative space and clean silhouettes of alien leaf structures and floating nebulae shapes. Use a deep indigo and electric teal color palette with metallic silver accents. The style must be vector-art inspired, detailed linework, clean outlines, high contrast, and optimized for screen printing on fabric. Cinematic lighting, smooth gradient transitions, perfectly centered.
